results.title: [Value of the antibiogram for the treatment of urogenital Ureaplasma infections].
results.abstract: We have currently established the spectrum of sensitivity of the isolated strains to various antibiotics before prescribing the appropriate treatment. A microtechnic has been used. The most active antibiotics are: minocyclin, pristinamycin, erythromycin, chloramphenicol, oxytetracyclin, kanamycin, tobramycin, streptomycin, in this order.
